title: On the existence and uniqueness of unbounded solutions to quadratic BSDEs with convex generators
snippet: With the terminal value $\xi^-$ admitting some given exponential moment and $\xi^+ $ admitting every exponential moments or being bounded, we present several existence and uniqueness results for the unbounded solutions of quadratic backward stochastic differential equations whose generator $ g $ may be non-Lipschitz with general growth in the first unknown variable $ y $, and is convex (concave) in the second unknown variable $ z $. This generalizes some results reported in [4] by relaxing the continuity and growth condition of …
